queries.question: What is the audio format that is the same for all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Audio_Formats.format_name  from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: What audio formats do all streaming services have in common and what are their descriptions?
queries.sql: SELECT Audio_Formats.format_name, Audio_Formats.description  from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Show a list of every description per streaming service
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , audio_formats.description from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats a :Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats .
  ?audio_formats a :Audio_Formats .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasAudio_Formats ?audio_formats .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?audio_formats p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me audio formats each streaming service uses and their descriptions.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , audio_formats.format_name , audio_formats.description from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?format_name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats a :Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats .
  ?audio_formats a :Audio_Formats .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasAudio_Formats ?audio_formats .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?audio_formats p:format_name ?format_name .
  ?audio_formats p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me a list of explanations of what our audio formats do within our streaming platforms
queries.sql: SELECT Audio_Formats.description  from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: List the audio formats available on each streaming service.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , audio_formats.format_name from Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats join Audio_Formats on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.audio_format_id = Audio_Formats.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?format_name WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats a :Streaming_Services_Audio_Formats .
  ?audio_formats a :Audio_Formats .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasAudio_Formats ?audio_formats .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_audio_formats p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?audio_formats p:format_name ?format_name .
}

Show me audio formats each streaming service uses and their descriptions.
Give me a list of explanations of what our audio formats do within our streaming platforms
